review_text: Love this app, makes managing money so easy!

The onboarding was confusing. I almost gave up signing up.
App is decent but the UI feels outdated compared to competitors.

Customer support never responds. Been waiting 2 weeks for a reply.
Finally a finance app that actually works. Highly recommend!
App crashes randomly on my iPhone 13. Needs urgent fix.
Easy to transfer money between accounts. Very convenient.

Statements download feature is fantastic. Saves me a lot of time.
Payment failed three times today. Lost confidence in this app.

Withdrawal got stuck for 4 days. No update from the app or support.

Best banking app available. Fast, clean, and reliable.

App freezes on the home screen every morning. Have to force close.

Onboarding video verification failed because of poor lighting detection.
Recurring payments work perfectly. Never missed a bill since using this.
The app keeps logging me out every few hours. Very irritating.

The app takes too long to open. Almost 10 seconds on my phone.
Love the QR code scanner for quick payments.
KYC document upload keeps timing out on mobile data.
Sent money to wrong UPI ID and support says they cannot help.
App is great for daily use. Quick and responsive.

Simple and clean UI. Much better than other banking apps.
Support ticket has been open for 3 weeks with no resolution.

Smooth experience overall. Rarely face any issues.
